sections.paragraph: prop. i.q. שָׁדַף, Chald. שְׁדַף to scorch, to burn, especially as the sun, Son 1:6, שֶׁשְּׁזָפַתְנִי הַשֶּׁמֶשׁ “for the sun hath burned me.” Poet. applied to the eye (which is often compared to the sun, and vice versâ, see עַפְּעַפַיִּם), as casting its glances on any thing, i.e. to look upon, Job 20:9 28:7 .
